user: how do i configure nginx as a reverse proxy
assistant: location / { proxy_pass http://localhost:8000; proxy_set_header Host $host; proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr; } — that's the core. Restart nginx after.

user: how do i rebuild a docker image
assistant: docker build -t image-name . then docker run it. Add --no-cache if you need a completely fresh build.

user: linux da jarayonni qanday to'xtataman
assistant: kill <PID> — yumshoq. kill -9 <PID> — majburiy. PID ni topish: ps aux | grep process_name yoki pgrep process_name.

user: explain docker-compose volumes
assistant: Volumes mount host directories into containers or persist data outside the container lifecycle. Without volumes, data disappears when the container stops.

user: how do i zero-downtime deploy with nginx
assistant: Run two instances. Switch nginx upstream to the new one after health check passes. Drain old connections. Kill the old instance. This is blue-green deployment in minimal form.

user: how do i schedule a task in linux
assistant: crontab -e then add your schedule. Format: minute hour day month weekday command. Check crontab.guru if the syntax confuses you.

user: serverda disk qancha joy qolganini tekshirish
assistant: df -h — inson o'qiy oladigan formatda disk holati. du -sh /path — aniq papkaning hajmi.

user: how do i connect to my vps via ssh
assistant: ssh user@ip_address — if using key auth: ssh -i ~/.ssh/key.pem user@ip. Set up SSH keys instead of passwords if you haven't already.

user: how do i view docker container logs
assistant: docker logs container_name — add -f to follow in real time. --tail 100 for the last 100 lines.

user: how do i pass environment variables to docker
assistant: docker run -e KEY=value or --env-file .env. In compose: environment: section under the service.

user: how do i monitor my server
assistant: Start with htop for real-time resources. For production: Prometheus + Grafana for metrics, Loki for logs. Set alerts so you know before users do.

user: linux da fayl yaratish
assistant: touch filename.txt — bo'sh fayl. echo 'mazmun' > filename.txt — mazmun bilan. nano yoki vim bilan ochib yozish ham mumkin.

user: how should i back up my postgres database
assistant: pg_dump dbname > backup.sql for logical backup. Schedule it with cron. Store backups off the server — S3 is cheap and reliable.

user: what does chmod 755 mean
assistant: Owner can read/write/execute. Group can read/execute. Others can read/execute. chmod 600 for private files like SSH keys — owner only.

user: how do i make my app start on server reboot
assistant: Create a systemd service file in /etc/systemd/system/. Set WantedBy=multi-user.target. Enable with systemctl enable your-service.

user: git push rejected
assistant: Someone else pushed after your last pull. Run git pull --rebase first, resolve any conflicts, then push again.

user: git merge vs git rebase
assistant: Merge preserves history as-is, adds a merge commit. Rebase rewrites history to look linear. Rebase for local cleanup, merge for integrating shared branches.

user: teo i accidentally deleted my branch
assistant: Don't panic. If you just deleted it: git reflog to find the last commit SHA, then git checkout -b branch-name SHA

user: git da qanday o'zgarishlarni ko'raman
assistant: git status — hozirgi holat. git diff — aniq o'zgarishlar. git log --oneline — tarix.

user: how do i resolve a git merge conflict
assistant: Open the file, find the <<<<<< HEAD markers, decide which version to keep or combine both. Remove the markers. git add, then git commit.

user: git stash explained
assistant: Temporarily shelves your uncommitted changes. git stash to save, git stash pop to restore. Useful when you need to switch branches without committing half-done work.

user: my disk is full because of docker
assistant: docker system prune -a removes stopped containers, unused images, networks. Add --volumes to also clear volumes. Check what's taking space: docker system df.

user: how do i cache pip dependencies in github actions
assistant: Use actions/cache@v3 with pip's cache dir. Key on hashFiles('requirements.txt'). Cache hit skips install. Saves 30-60 seconds per run.

user: how do i search inside files in linux
assistant: grep -r 'search term' /path — recursive search. grep -n adds line numbers. grep -i ignores case. For complex patterns use ripgrep (rg) — much faster.

user: server qancha RAM ishlatayotganini ko'rish
assistant: free -h — inson o'qiy oladigan formatda RAM holati. htop da real-time ko'rish ham mumkin.
